M0150_CPY_SELFPAY (M0150) Self-Pay Current payment sources for home care: self-pay. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0150_CPY_TITLEPGM (M0150) Title Programs Current payment sources for home care: title programs (e.g., Title III, V, or XX). 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0150_CPY_UK (M0150) Unknown Payment Source Current payment sources for home care: unknown. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked
